channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Footpath slabs broken on Keel Close, 10th May
item.description:
Footpath uneven making it unsafe. Outside 17 Keel Close. Has been like this for over 1 year.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Keel Close, Rotherhithe, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: General fly tipping, 10th May
item.description:
Toilets table chair lawnmower metal racks and other items
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Mandela Way, Old Kent Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Green telecomms cabinet doors open exposing phone and possibly power cables at the junction of Shortlands Rd and Valley Rd, Shortlands., 10th May
item.description:
Green telecomms cabinet doors open exposing phone and possibly power cables at the junction of Shortlands Rd and Valley Rd, Shortlands. Seen Friday 8/5/26. I have tried the BT OpenReach website but the chatbot / phone line is not available at 1.25am when I just wish to leave a report by web form. Please communicate this problem in the public safety interest. Their hundreds of phone lines also look highly vulnerable affecting customers. I do not know that this is BT OpenReach as there is nothing on the cabinet. It is the low double door cabinet with my orange arrow to indicate it

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Shortlands Road, Shortlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Utility Works and Temporary Traffic Lights

item.title: Graffiti on bus shelter, 10th May
item.description:
Black graffiti tag on the side panel of the bus shelter next to the Buses roundel, and white graffiti on the glass panel.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Coldharbour Lane, Loughborough Junction, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Graffiti / Flyposting on stop or shelter (non-offensive)

item.title: Abandoned bicycle, 10th May
item.description:
A grey Dawes bicycle is locked to a cycle stand. The chain is rusty and the bike appears to be abandoned.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 41, Stockwell Green, Stockwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti on street cabinet, 10th May
item.description:
Yellow graffiti on a black TfL street cabinet located outside the entrance to Stockwell Gardens Estate.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Stockwell Gardens, Stockwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tfl street cabinet damaged, 10th May
item.description:
A TfL street cabinet is leaning heavily and appears to have been crashed into. The door is slightly ajar. There is graffiti on it, but the structural damage is the main issue.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 13-15, Stockwell Road, Stockwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Pavement Defect (uneven surface / cracked paving slab)

Brondesbury Park/Christchurch Avenue - TfL Black Box In Disrepair

item.title: Traffic island needs yellow lines, 9th May
item.description:
The car in my pictures is parked legally, there are no parking restrictions. Cars park in this spot all the time. But. There is little room for buses or large hgv’s to get through if there are cars parked here. I would say I have to help a bus through this space once or twice a week. This evening a 54 bus put its very loud alarm on at 11pm as it couldn’t get through . Annoying! I’d like to request yellow lines outside 173 Croydon Road (my neighbour) by the traffic island. It’s also a pedestrian crossing. This situation has got a lot worse now that ringo has come into force at the Elmer’s end parade of shops!

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 177, Croydon Road, Elmers End, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Recently removed but now fresh grafitti, 9th May
item.description:
A couple of weeks ago this area was cleaned. The lamppost and utility boxes were all nice and clean and some cleaning was done to the walls of the overpass. That same Zoose (Loose?) person spitefully returned and sprayed everywhere again. There's even a bench in the adjacent parking area that they tagged with silver paint. I'm fed up of this character and they must be dealt with. It is disgusting to have our neighbourhood vandalised like this.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Felixstowe Road, West Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish dumping, 9th May
item.description:
Why not put another recycling bin there ongoing problem

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Perry Street, Crayford, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Street lights not working, 9th May
item.description:
Two street lights opposite each other making it very dark
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 49, Melbourne Grove, East Dulwich, Greater London

item.title: Abandoned vehicle on foriegn plates, 9th May
item.description:
Silver ford focus on foriegn plates been abandoned. Hasn't moved for ages and no one know who owns it
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Bullsmoor Lane, Enfield
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Persistent Fly-Tipping and Evidence of Offenders, 9th May
item.description:
What are you doing to catch the individuals responsible for fly-tipping at this specific location? There is an accumulation of waste occurring here every single day. I have found evidence of names/addresses. Please investigate and take action.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Northwold Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Very dangerous broken metal pole, 9th May
item.description:
Sticking out and very dangerous by Grovelands Park entrance

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Broad Walk, Southgate
Report on FixMyStreet
